SOSP 2026
The 32nd Symposium on Operating Systems Principles

September 29th - October 2nd, 2026 · Clarion Congress Hotel Prague, Prague, Czechia

Early registration deadline: TBD!

SOSP goes to Central Europe!

The annual ACM Symposium on Operating Systems Principles is the world's premier forum for researchers, developers, programmers, and teachers of computer systems technology. Academic and industrial participants present research and experience papers that cover the full range of theory and practice of computer systems software.

Where

Clarion Congress Hotel Prague, Prague, Czechia

When

September 29th - October 2nd, 2026

Awards

Congratulations to the winners of the following SOSP 2026 awards:

  • Best Paper Award: TBD
  • Best Paper Award: TBD
  • Distinguished Artifact Award: TBD
  • Distinguished Artifact Award Honorable Mention: TBD
  • Distinguished Artifact Award Honorable Mention: TBD
